audit_items.proof_trace: All allocation results are null-checked before use (ber at L67-69). The mods parameter is allowed to be NULL (guarded at L80) and each element is checked by the loop condition at L82. Parameters dn, msgidp, and mods[i]->mod_type that lack explicit null checks are API contract parameters: in all real call paths, msgidp is always a stack address (&id), dn is always a non-NULL parsed LDAP DN (root DN uses empty string, not NULL), and mod_type is always set to ad_cname.bv_val which is non-NULL for any valid slapd attribute description.
